hypothesis: Incorporating a real-time synthesizability scoring module—trained on documented synthesis routes from scientific literature using a separate LLM fine-tuned on experimental procedural text—as an additional feedback signal within MatAgent's iterative refinement loop will simultaneously improve the experimental realizability of proposed compositions and shift the LLM's tool-selection strategy toward greater reliance on the knowledge base over the periodic table, because synthesis-feasibility constraints impose stronger compositional specificity than isoelectronic substitution logic alone can satisfy.
